nasb.text: Entering the tomb, they saw a young man sitting at the right, wearing a white robe; and they were amazed.

esv.text: And entering the tomb, they saw a young man sitting on the right side, dressed in a white robe, and they were alarmed.

cnv.text: 她們進了墳墓，看見一位身穿白袍的青年，坐在右邊，就非常驚恐。

ccb.text: 她们进了坟墓，看见一位身穿洁白长袍的青年坐在右边，吓了一跳。

csbs.text: 她们进了墓穴，看见一个年轻人身穿白袍坐在右边，就大吃一惊。
